gpt-5.1.name: GPT-5.1 (primary chat model)
gpt-5.1.note: Pricing estimated; OpenAI has not published GPT-5.1 pricing as of Apr 2026

architectureFindings.contextAssembly: Rails sends ALL chat_messages to worker; worker caps via buildContextWithSummary
architectureFindings.evalProvenOptimum: window=6 messages (quality plateaus at 6; window=20 shows distraction effect)
architectureFindings.gpt51ContextLimit: defaults to 20k recommended (model not in token-counter.js modelLimits)

config.description: Real Langua: unbounded until turn 50, then system+summary+last40msgs, re-summarize every 15 turns
Incremental: fallback 20msgs pre-summary, first at turn 40, incremental re-summary every 20 turns (only new msgs), 24-msg window, 300-tok summaries
Optimal V3: window=6 msgs (eval-proven), first summary turn 30, incremental re-summary every 20 turns, 250-tok structured summaries, 50% prompt cache discount
System prompt + last 6 messages (sliding window)
Real Langua BUG: no summary triggered (< turn 50) — ALL messages sent every turn (unbounded)
